description: Mock application packet: Zafran Foods Trading LLC, a Dubai mainland Legal Person - UAE Private Company wholesaling spices, registering for Corporate Tax and obtaining a TRN. All values are fabricated illustrative data (not a real business, TRN, Emirates ID, or passport), constructed to exercise every conditional branch: entityType=legal_person_private_company with a trade license (exercises the Main License Details block, since this sub-type is not on the trade-license-exclusion list), ownerType=natural_person (the sole individual owner, 100% shareholding), hasBranchesInUae=false (base-case negative branch), and authorizedSignatoryIsUaeResident=true (exercises the Emirates ID block alongside the always-required passport block). The generator also exercises three negative branches directly against the condition evaluator: entityType=natural_person_individual (country/date-of-incorporation/tax-period correctly not required), authorizedSignatoryIsUaeResident=false (Emirates ID fields correctly not required), and entityType=legal_person_foreign_company (trade license fields correctly not required, per the p.22 carve-out list).

data.tradeLicenseIssuingAuthority: Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism
data.businessActivityName: Trading in spices and food seasonings
